description: You are the general manager of a restaurant that has just received a tax compliance audit notice. The auditors found that your POS system uses a single generic 'US' tax rate for all sales, which violates state regulations requiring separate tax categories. Configure the Floreant POS Back Office (PIN: 1111) with three new tax rates: 'FOOD TAX' at 5.5%, 'ALCOHOL TAX' at 9.0%, and 'RETAIL TAX' at 7.25%. Reassign all menu items in the 'BEER & WINE' category to use the ALCOHOL TAX rate, and all menu items in the 'RETAIL' category to use the RETAIL TAX rate. The original 'US' tax rate must remain unchanged at 6.0%.
